channel.title: Police on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Police on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: MP Police Band Bharti 2026
item.description: MP Police Band Constable Recruitment 2026 has been officially announced by Madhya Pradesh Police for a total of 679 Constable (Band) posts. This recruitment is conducted for male candidates only, and applicants must have passed 10th (High School) along with knowledge of musical/band instruments. The online application process will start from 05 April 2026 and will continue till 19 April 2026 through the MP Online portal. Interested candidates are advised to check the official notification carefully before applying.
